mnemonics.title: Inner Product
mnemonics.content: I Picked A Scalar (Inner Product Assigns Scalar)

mnemonics.title: Schwarz Inequality
mnemonics.content: Schwarz Says Absolute Value Is Less Than Or Equal (Schwarz inequality)

acronyms.usage: The IP of two vectors is a scalar value.
The SI states that the absolute value of the IP of two vectors is less than or equal to the product of their norms.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine two vectors and a scalar value that represents their 'similarity'.
Imagine two vectors that are perpendicular to each other.

analogies.analogy: The inner product is like a similarity score between two vectors.
The Schwarz inequality is like a limit on the similarity score between two vectors.
